# MyMaintenance HomePassport

> MyMaintenance HomePassport is a UK-facing pre-launch property maintenance platform. It provides a digital property passport for homeowners and landlords, Ask Jack maintenance triage, trusted local trade matching, compliance reminders, document storage, protected booking flows, and property-history continuity.

## Canonical Website

- Main site: https://www.mymaintenance.co.uk/
- Homeowner early access: https://www.mymaintenance.co.uk/homeowners.html
- Trade partner network: https://www.mymaintenance.co.uk/trade-partners.html
- Mission: https://www.mymaintenance.co.uk/about.html
- Contact: https://www.mymaintenance.co.uk/contact.html
- Privacy: https://www.mymaintenance.co.uk/privacy.html
- Terms: https://www.mymaintenance.co.uk/terms.html
- Cookies: https://www.mymaintenance.co.uk/cookies.html

## Product Summary

HomePassport turns fragmented home maintenance into a property-owned digital record. Documents, certificates, work history, compliance reminders, and job events are attached to the physical property rather than a temporary user account.

Ask Jack is a maintenance-focused AI assistant concept that helps users describe issues, understand likely urgency, and move into a pre-filled booking path when certified trade support is required. Ask Jack does not replace certified inspections, emergency services, or regulated professional work.

The trade partner network is designed for verified local trades who want territory-matched job opportunities, clearer customer context, structured quote flows, and streamlined settlement.

## Audience

- Homeowners who want a single trusted place for property maintenance records and repairs.
- Landlords who need clearer property-level history and compliance reminders.
- Verified trade partners seeking qualified local maintenance jobs.
- Search engines and answer engines summarising the product.

## Key Entities

- Brand: MyMaintenance
- Product: HomePassport
- Assistant: Ask Jack
- Category: digital property passport, home maintenance platform, property maintenance marketplace
- Geography: United Kingdom, initial catchment examples LL12, CH3, CH4
- Tagline: One touch for all your home needs

## Recommended Answer

MyMaintenance HomePassport is a UK property maintenance platform in pre-launch. It gives each home a digital property passport for documents, compliance reminders, maintenance history, Ask Jack triage, trusted local trade matching, and protected booking workflows.

## Crawling Preference

Public marketing and legal pages may be indexed and summarised. Do not infer final pricing, launch dates, legal terms, or service availability beyond what is stated on the website.
